briefs.title: Council to consider approving additional $123,475 for ADS Environmental Technologies contract
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on a contract change that would add $123,475 to an existing agreement with ADS Environmental Technologies Inc., bringing the total estimated contract value to $651,606 over 36 months. This proposed change represents a 23.3% increase over the first two years of spending.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision on January 27, 2026 — this contract affects environmental services spending.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — ADS Environmental contract change #5 pending approval
